reviews.comment:
Muy buenos los precios de combustible de la YPF ACA Caleu Caleu sobre la Ruta Nacional 22

(Translated by Google)
The fuel prices at the YPF ACA Caleu Caleu station on National Route 22 are very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtMGV5WVNBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy mala predisposición ...te dicen mire las flechas para cargar combustible y si hay 10 autos en un solo surtidor no te dicen pase por acá parece que mientras menos gente tengan en su isla mejor osea que trabaje el compañero .

(Translated by Google)
Very poor attitude... they tell you to look at the arrows to refuel, and if there are 10 cars at a single pump they don't tell you to go this way; it seems that the fewer people they have at their island, the better, meaning that the other guy should do his job.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtd2ZxWXJBRRAB

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:

Very congested during the holiday season, there are delays of more than an hour to fill up with fuel! You have to be very patient.
